research_alignment_rows.control: explicit provenance and responsibility attribution for agentic AI
research_alignment_rows.root_binding: runtime authority, agent/tool use, and settlement decisions are root-bound before release
source-footers and payout eligibility must bind causal evidence utility artifacts
visible citations require citation-verification and grounded-reuse contracts

research_alignment_rows.root_binding: root artifact binds attribution BOM, proof graph, assurance, and lifecycle contracts
public hashes, verifier commands, and proof graph are published as challengeable statements
root, certification attestation, and public credentials verify by signature and hash replay

research_alignment_rows.control: content credentials with hard bindings and AI/ML asset types
research_alignment_rows.root_binding: content credentials are treated as one surface of the root, not the whole attribution system

research_alignment_rows.control: creator data licensing and compensation market design
